Class MetaView

java.lang.Object
org.openxava.util.meta.MetaElement
org.openxava.view.meta.MetaView
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class MetaView extends MetaElement implements Cloneable
Author:
Javier Paniza

    • setName

      public void setName(String newName)
      If newName is null or empty is replaced by emptySection.

      If newName contains blanks (\n, \r, \t, \f) or whitespace are suppressed.

      Overrides:
      setName in class MetaElement
      Since:
      5.2.1
